resources.string: Get notified when your signature is required or a device requests access.
A new signing request is waiting for you
Receive alerts when another device requests to join your vault or when your signature is required.
You can manage notifications in system settings.
Wait until node is churned out
TRX coin not found in vault
Deposit your USDC into a Circle account and earn yield. Securely within your Vultisig vault.
Funds remain fully under your vault\'s control. Circle accounts are self-custodial and yield is generated through secure off-chain treasuries.
Keep devices on the same WiFi Network, correct vault and pair devices.\nMake sure no other devices are running Vultisig.
Reshare vault with a new committee
Generate key to enable QBTC chain
Hold $VULT to unlock lower trading fees.
By holding 1,500 $VULT, you\'ll unlock the Bronze Tier and receive a
By holding 3,000 $VULT, you\'ll unlock the Silver Tier and receive a
By holding 7,500 $VULT, you\'ll unlock the Gold Tier and receive a
By holding 15,000 $VULT, you\'ll unlock the Platinum Tier and receive a
By holding 100,000 $VULT, you\'ll unlock the Diamond Tier and receive a
By holding 1,000,000 $VULT, you\'ll unlock the Ultimate Tier and receive a
You do not have the required vault for Keysign
Amount must be a positive number
Operator fee must be a valid number between 0 and 10000 basis points
MSCA account not deployed yet, please try again
I’m sending to the right address
Camera permission not granted. Please, enable it in the settings.
I am aware that the vault will be deleted permanently
I am aware that I can lose funds
I have made a vault backup
You are permanently deleting your vault
What are the benefits of using Vultisig?
Can I recover my assets if I lose a device?
What are the fees and costs?
What cryptocurrencies are supported by Vultisig?
It is a secure, multi-authentication wallet based on MPC technology that is used to manage digital assets. Transactions require approval from multiple devices.
Vultisig offers enhanced security with multi-device authentication, support for many blockchains, easy recovery options, and no seed phrases or user tracking.
Yes, as long as you saved and have access to your backups when creating the vault. You can import these backups on a new device to regain access to your assets.
Vultisig securely stores and manages digital assets. All actions, such as sending or swapping, require the threshold of devices to sign transactions.
Vultisig is free to use. Only standard network fees apply to sending. And for swaps and bridges, there\'s a 0.5% (50 bps) fee.
Vultisig supports major cryptocurrencies and tokens, with over 30 chains and their tokens, currently available.
I agree with the min. amount I\'ll receive
Amount must be a positive number
Not enough available UTXOs to cover the selected amount. Please add more funds or reduce the amount you\'re sending
This password was set when the vault share was exported.
File permission is required for backup operations.
File permission is required for share operations.
I agree with providing ERC20 allowance
You are not whitelisted on this node
Source and destination assets cannot be the same.
Unsupported file type, please try again
Extension not supported. Backup failed. Supported file extensions are: %s
Reshare can be used to refresh, expand or reduce the amount of devices in a Vault.
For all Reshare actions the threshold of devices is always required.
Threshold not reached\nMissing enough initial devices
Disabling on-chain security means Blockaid can\'t verify transactions. You\'ll be less protected
You can disable your realtime on-chain security provided by Blockaid.
Biometrics for Fast Signing is enabled
Biometrics for Fast Signing is disabled
Not enough gas to cover the transaction fee.\nPlease fund the wallet.
Mixed Reshare signing.\nPlease use vault shares of the same Reshare cycle.
Enter it, create a vault, never look back.
Use a vault share to recover your vault.
Recover your vault or convert your seedphrase to a vault
Scan with devices to join the\nvault generation
Folder needs at least one selected vault

If the QR code isn't scanning right away:
• Move the phone slightly closer or farther from the screen
• Make sure the screen is well lit and free of glare
• Keep both devices steady for a moment
This deposit has not reached its maturity period yet
Same vault share. Please change the share to sign
Don\'t forget to backup your vault shares and verify the completeness.
Not enough %1$s to cover gas fees
Insufficient %1$s balance for the swap and gas fees. Top up %1$s or reduce swap amount
Not enough %1$s to cover gas fees. Please fund the wallet.
Swap request timed out. Please try again
Price impact is too high. Try a smaller amount or a different token pair.
Swap quote failed. Please try again or adjust the amount.
Too many requests. Please try again later.
Transaction will likely fail, vault could not be loaded.
Relay server unavailable, please try again
Network connection lost. Please check your internet connection

Ensure you leave enough funds to cover the fees. If an account balance falls below 1 DOT (Existential Deposit), the account will be deactivated (reaped) and any remaining funds will be lost. You can reactivate the address with a new deposit larger than the existential deposit at any time. However, this will not recover the lost funds.
Transaction timed out due to slow signing. Please try again.
This address is not valid for %s

plurals.name: address_bookmark_error_invalid_label
plurals.item: Label must be between 1 and %d characters
Label must be between 1 and %d characters

resources.string: Ensure you leave enough funds to cover the fees. If an account balance falls below 1 XRP (Existential Deposit), the account will be deactivated (reaped) and any remaining funds will be lost. You can reactivate the address with a new deposit larger than the existential deposit at any time. However, this will not recover the lost funds.
The to address must be different from the from address
if a device is lost or damaged
Always back up each vault share
I have read and understand what to do
Download Vultisig on your other device(s) and select \'Scan QR code\'
giving complete control over your assets
Swap your favorite tokens all in one vault
on Android, iOS, macOS and Windows
This should only take a second
Scan QR with other device. 3-device setup recommended, 2 is sufficient.
You can always rename your vault later in the settings
This email is used for cloud backup and shared with no third party
This occurs because the password is used to locally encrypt the backup file, similar to how a hard drive is encrypted. In the following step, you have the option to add a hint.
Password cannot be reset or recovered
This will be shown in case you forget your password
and sign faster than ever before
You’ll create new Vault Share backups,
store them as you did before
Selected token is not found for this address
We periodically ask for a verification so you don\'t forget your password.
This transaction has been flagged as potentially dangerous.
Share your unique referral code to invite friends. They get a discount and the more they trade, the more you earn — directly delivered to your vault
Create your own code and earn\u0020
Enter your referral code here. Enjoy 10% off every transaction.
Referral code must be no more than 4 characters
Referral code must contain only alphanumeric characters
Failed to check referral code. Please try again.
Destination address should not be empty
Only CACAO token is supported for pool operations

The referral program is applied for THORChain swaps and is on a best effort basis. You need to register a THORName to use the Vultisig referral. The registration fee is 10 RUNE and 1 RUNE for each year, which is paid to the THORChain network.
Failed to load fees. Please try again.
Pick a short code and set your reward payout.
Invite friends to use your code while swapping.
Get paid in your preferred asset every time they trade.
Use a code from your friend and save on swap fees.
Turn your vault into a rewards machine. Create your referral now and start earning
Is Vultisig open source and audited?
How does Vultisig handle privacy and data protection?
How does Vultisig compare to other multisig wallets?
Yes, Vultisig is open source and has undergone security audits. Both the audit reports and the source code are accessible.
Vultisig does not store any user information from its mobile apps.
It is built on MPC technology, which eliminates the need for seed phrases and supports multiple blockchains, making Vultisig flexible and chain-agnostic.
Keep all your important addresses organized in one place.
This QR Code lets you share a view-only version of your Vault
%1$s will be removed from your address book
Do you want to encrypt your backup with a password?
If you choose to add a password, it will be used to encrypt the backup file.
Remember: If you forget your vault password, it cannot be reset or recovered.
By default, your backup is secure without an extra password, since you store Vault shares in different locations.
Choose whether to back up just this vault or all vaults in your app.
Store the vault share of this device.
View vault name, part and type
Back up your Vault Share to device or server.
Reshare, manage security or sign messages.
Make sure that the chain you’re looking for is enabled.
Due to technical limitations of key import and seed-based wallets, only pre-generated chains can be selected.
You’ve disabled all chains. Make sure that at least one chain is enabled.
Could not find the other device on your network
Waiting for other devices to join
Your vault will start generating from the moment you finalize setting up your vault on your main device
Please enable WiFi or mobile to sign transaction
Enter your password to unlock your Server Share and start the upgrade
Vault with this name already exists
A fast vault with this seed phrase already exists on the server. Creating a new fast vault will replace the server share and make the existing vault unusable. Consider using a secure vault instead.

plurals.name: referral_code_can_be_up_to_characters
plurals.item: Referral code can be up to %1$d characters
Referral code can be up to %1$d characters

resources.string: Minimum send amount is %1$s %2$s. %3$s requires this to prevent spam.
Minimum send amount is %1$s ADA. Cardano requires this to prevent spam.
Insufficient balance. Try \'Send Max\' to send %1$s ADA instead.
Insufficient balance (%1$s ADA). You need more ADA to complete this transaction.
This amount would leave too little change. 💡 Try \'Send Max\' (%1$s ADA) to avoid this issue.
Enable at least one token to view balances and manage positions.
You’re ready to use a new wallet standard.
Possible reasons: wrong contract, unsupported chain, or token removed from registries.
You\'ve disabled all positions for this chain. Enable at least one position to view balances and manage actions.
Enable at least one position to view balances and manage positions.

Bandwidth Points are required for every transaction on TRON, including both standard token sends and smart contract interactions. Every TRON user receives 600 free Bandwidth Points per day, which can cover approximately two basic sends. Additionally, you can earn extra Bandwidth Points by staking TRX, increasing your daily balance to support more transactions. If you have enough Bandwidth Points, you can send tokens, stake TRX, or interact with smart contracts without paying TRX in gas fees.

Required for more complex actions, such as interacting with smart contracts (e.g., swaps or dApp transactions). Unlike Bandwidth, Energy is not given for free—you need to stake TRX to earn Energy. (More advanced users can also acquire Energy through leasing mechanisms such as JustLend or Tronify’s Energy rental markets). However, having Energy can significantly reduce or even eliminate the gas fees for smart contract interactions, making Energy valuable for those who use TRON dApps frequently.
THORChain address not found in vault. Please ensure you have RUNE in your vault
The selected asset is not a secured asset and cannot be processed
Failed to create Circle MSCA account. Please try again.
Enter it, create a vault, never look back
Any device that can run Vultisig will work.
You haven\'t made any swaps, sends, or approvals from this vault.
Enter your 12 or 24 word recovery phrase
You entered %1$s words. Seed phrase must be 12 or 24
This seed phrase has already been imported
Please import a different seed phrase
We\'re checking which blockchains have active addresses for your seed phrase.
This process can take up to 2 minutes.
Each extra chain increases the time to generate your vault and possibility of a timeout.
We couldn\'t find any balances. Please select the chains you want to import manually.
Unable to import vault from seed phrase. Please check your seed phrase and try again.
No seed phrase found. Please re-enter your seed phrase and try again.
Make sure that these are the correct devices you\'ve added:
Tip: You can use a browser as a device
Convenient one-device signing on the go. Perfect for daily transactions or trading smaller amounts.
No long setup. Just your email and password, plus two backups.
A co-signer can never initiate transactions; only assists with signing them.
No inspiration? You can always change the name later in your settings.
This email is used for cloud backup and shared with no third party
If you want an extra layer of security, choose a password. Password cannot be recovered.
This will only be used once to send your backup file, Vultisig doesn\'t store any data.
Backups power your vault. Each device has its own backup. A backup alone can’t move funds, it’s only for recovery. Import and recover any lost device.
The Device backup and password are the key. The server only co-signs and backup can be requested.
Keep each backup in a different place. If one is compromised, your funds stay safe.
Export this backup file, then save it to the cloud.
with the password set earlier to unlock your Vault.
Use a different cloud service or account for each backup. When you\'re finished, delete the file from this device.
Use a different cloud service or account for each backup. When you’re finished, delete the file from this device.
I understand how to save this backup
Your vault is ready to use
You’re all set! You stay in control of every transaction.
Every transaction needs approvals from both of your devices.
One device alone can’t move funds. If one device is lost or exposed, it can’t approve on its own.
Perfect balance for most users. 2 signers and 1 backup device. Store assets without stress.
Perfect setup for users with only 2 devices.
Vaults need 67% of devices to sign a transaction. Have as many signers as you want.
Add as many devices as you want and receive institutional-grade security.

plurals.name: vault_setup_you_ll_create_n_backups_in_total
plurals.item: You’ll create %1$d backups in total. You will do this on each device.
You’ll create %1$d backups in total. You will do this on each device.

resources.string: Save each backup in a different cloud service or with a different password. If one is exposed, your funds stay safe.
Save backup %1$d of %2$d to the cloud
This email is used for cloud backup and shared with no third party
Enter the password you set when creating this Vault.
We just sent your backup share to your email. If you don\'t see it, check your spam folder.
The server took too long to respond, please check your internet connection and try again.
Too many backup requests. Please try again later.
Something went wrong. Please check your details and try again.
Rewards are automatically credited to your balance.
